word: G3672 - ὁμολογουμένως - homologouménōs - hom-ol-og-ow-men'-oce - Without controversy

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ὁμολογουμένως

- Transliteration: Homologoumenos

- Phonetic: hom-ol-og-ow-men'-oce

- Definition:

1. by consent of all, confessedly, without controversy

- Origin: from present passive participle of G3670

- TDNT entry: 08:19,7

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Adverb of present passive participle of G3670; confessedly: - without controversy.
